items.title: PayPal Reportedly Receives Acquisition Interest From Stripe
items.description: Stripe has expressed preliminary interest in a potential acquisition of the digital payments pioneer or its assets, Bloomberg reported on Tuesday.

items.title: Why Is Hut8 Stock Rising Today?
items.description: The company is expected to post a revenue of $95.6 million, more than twice what it reported in the same quarter last year.
